summary: Stabilization v3 testing completed. Campaign Performance API endpoint and widgets verified. All 9 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified - CampaignPerformanceWidget renders correctly on AdminDashboard and AffiliateCampaignsPage. CurrentPromotionsWidget correctly returns null when no active campaigns exist.

campaign_performance_api.notes: Returns campaigns array and totals (clicks, redemptions, revenue, commissions, conversion_rate). Works correctly with empty campaigns.

campaign_performance_widget_admin_dashbo.notes: Widget renders with data-testid='campaign-performance-widget'. Shows metrics: Clicks, Redemptions, Revenue, Conversion rate.

campaign_performance_widget_campaigns_pa.notes: Widget renders at top of page with correct metrics display.

new_campaign_button.notes: '+ New Campaign' button found and clickable

current_promotions_widget.notes: Widget correctly returns null when no active campaigns exist. This is expected behavior per code design.

affiliate_settings_page.notes: Page loads with data-testid='affiliate-settings-page'. Save button has data-testid='save-settings-btn'.

checkout_attribution_endpoints.notes: All checkout attribution endpoints working correctly from previous iteration.

critical_code_review_comments: CampaignPerformanceWidget properly uses api.get() for data fetching
campaign_performance_routes.py correctly handles empty campaigns (returns 0 values)
CurrentPromotionsWidget returns null when no items - clean empty state handling
All widgets have appropriate data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Campaign Performance v3 stabilization complete. CampaignPerformanceWidget shows metrics (clicks, redemptions, revenue, conversion) on AdminDashboard and AffiliateCampaignsPage. CurrentPromotionsWidget only displays when there are active campaigns (returns null otherwise - expected). All checkout attribution endpoints verified from iteration_32.
